conclusion.reason: Rate-only selector compression is blocked; the smallest rate-feasible byte-closed component-moving packet changes selector codes and its proxy component delta (0.00014263862536600946) exceeds the strict CPU gate allowance (3.949412003545483e-06).

blocker.reason: Decoded-selector-preserving compression cannot save the required bytes: FEC6 is within a few bytes of its global entropy floor, and charged FEC7 range/adaptive candidates regress after model bytes are counted.

fec7_best_charged_candidate.description: one PR103 merged range stream over 16 selector symbols
fec7_best_charged_candidate.name: fec7_global_pr103_range_u8_hist
